scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @clientpad/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @clientpad/sdk typecheck && pnpm --filter @clientpad/whatsapp typecheck && pnpm --filter @clientpad/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @clientpad/cloud typecheck && pnpm --filter @clientpad/dashboard typecheck && pnpm --filter @clientpad/marketing typecheck
scripts.ci: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:core && pnpm run test:sdk && pnpm run test:server && pnpm run check:deps && pnpm run check:examples
scripts.verify: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:sdk && pnpm run test:whatsapp && pnpm run test:server && pnpm run test:cloud && pnpm run test:dashboard && pnpm run check:deps && pnpm run check:examples
